title: Google Calendar specific choice to sync

posts.author: postproducerTFO (Omar)
posts.cookedHtml:
A google user often has more than a single calendar.
Th option to choose which of his (her) calendar is able to sycn with monday.com is paramount for someone who is in charge of multiple calendars throughout his tv studio or such.
Currently we are only able to sync the INITIAL calendar of the google user. No other option allows for a specific calendar to be chosen for sync.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @postproducerTFO ,

We recently launched the app Google Calendar Sync - monday.com Marketplace, which allows you to choose any of your calendars instead of just being restricted to your primary calendar. It will fit your use case perfectly.

Other Features

  1. Ability to select any calendar instead of default one
  2. Ability to create event on status column change
  3. Ability to configure realtime 1-way sync and 2-way sync as per need
  4. Ability to send invites to team members and guests from monday itself

If you want to see it in action checkout our demo video here

posts.author: jameslavis (james lavis)
posts.cookedHtml: So the issue here is it’s a paid add on that won’t pass many company’s IT parameters. We need this feature either include in monday.com itself or a free add on. There’s no way a monthly fee to a third party would pass protocol.
